title: A proposed protocol for the management of COVID-19 in Egypt
author: Khaled Sorour
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: As regarding the current pandemic, there is no definitive treatment for COVID-19. In this paper we are proposing a treatment protocol that consists of Umifenovir as antiviral and Indomethacin as anti-inflammatory drug with reported inhibitory actions against SARS-CoV-2 in vitro. This does not mean promoting the use of this protocol, but to get involved in clinical trials to validate the safety and efficacy of this combination. Experimental studies are the only way to judge the effectiveness of this regimen.

Experimental studies are the only way to judge the effectiveness of this regimen.
